results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/main.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py - primary memory API surface for create/list/search flows, ACL checks, and state transitions
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py - orchestrates smart_add_memory and hybrid_search across vector, graph, and temporal retrieval
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - core Mem0 pipeline implementation where add/search behavior and backend integration actually execute

ENTRYPOINT: mem0/memory/main.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/memory.py - builds and caches the Mem0 client, loads repo-specific config, and hands app/MCP calls into the core `Memory` object
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/vector_stores - persistence and similarity-search boundary for memories; provider-specific retrieval, filtering, and storage behavior lives here
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/utils/factory.py - wires the LLM, embedder, vector store, graph store, and reranker providers, so config changes here reshape the whole pipeline

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py
SUBSYSTEM: embedchain/embedchain/loaders - ingress layer for external content before memory processing
SUBSYSTEM: embedchain/embedchain/chunkers - controls how content is split for embedding and retrieval
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/vector_stores - persistence and query backends for stored memory embeddings

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py - advanced-mode orchestrator for hybrid search, fact review, deduplication, and async graph extraction
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - core mem0 engine that builds the embedder/vector/LLM/graph backends and runs add/search across vector and graph stores
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/graph_memory.py - Neo4j entity/relationship layer behind graph add/search/delete, supplying the graph half of hybrid memory

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/memory.py - builds the configured singleton `mem0.Memory` client from config/env and applies repo-specific provider fixes
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - core add/search engine that initializes vector, LLM, reranker, and graph backends and splits work into vector-store and graph paths
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/graph_memory.py - graph enrichment layer for entity extraction, relationship writes, graph search, and cleanup on deletes

ENTRYPOINT: openmemory/api/app/routers/memories.py
SUBSYSTEM: openmemory/api/app/utils/enhanced_memory.py - advanced-mode orchestrator for hybrid search, fact extraction/review, dedup, and batched graph kickoff
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/main.py - canonical Memory.add/search implementation that owns embeddings, vector-store writes, updates/deletes, and graph dispatch
SUBSYSTEM: mem0/memory/graph_memory.py - Neo4j graph engine for entity extraction, relation creation, graph search, and delete cleanup
